data.name: WelcomeMessage
data.value: The Start of Secure Photo Trading, Photo Market

data.name: WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Safely trade your valuable assets on a trusted platform.

data.name: Feature1Desc
data.value: All photo data is securely protected with industry-standard security technology.

data.name: Feature2Desc
data.value: We only handle high-resolution assets that have undergone a professional review process.

data.name: Feature3Desc
data.value: Share ideas and grow through the global community.
